description_long: This is a compact, rectangular shopping cart with a deep, open-topped red plastic basket and two tall, black metal handles extending vertically from the rear. The basket features rounded corners and a reinforced rim, providing structural integrity and a smooth edge for handling. The handles are tubular and appear to be coated for durability, with a horizontal grip bar at the top for easy maneuvering. The cart lacks a traditional wire mesh design, instead utilizing solid molded plastic for the main compartment, which is seamless and easy to clean. There are no visible wheels or child seating areas, suggesting a lightweight, possibly stackable design for smaller loads or specialized use. The exterior is uniformly colored with no visible branding or decorative elements.
description: A compact red plastic shopping cart with tall black metal handles and a seamless, open-topped basket. The design is minimalistic, with no visible wheels, branding, or child seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open red basket and the two black handles rising from the back.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the basket and the smooth, rounded rim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin handles and the solid back of the basket, with no visible wheels.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the basket's rectangular shape and the clean, unadorned exterior.
attribute_wire_basket_pattern: No wire basket; main compartment is a solid molded plastic tub with smooth, continuous surfaces and no mesh or grid pattern.
attribute_handlebar_design: Handles are tall, straight, tubular metal rods with a horizontal black grip bar at the top; no ergonomic padding or branding visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: No wheels are visible on the cart; it appears to be a stationary or liftable design.
